prompt: Create a grand romantic realist oil painting of an alpine wilderness at golden sunset, with a vast calm mountain lake in the foreground reflecting the sky, pine forests, rocky shores, and towering snow-covered peaks. The central peak is majestic and sharply lit with warm orange sunlight, surrounded by rugged cliffs and distant glaciers fading into atmospheric mist. The sun sits low near the right horizon, casting glowing amber light across the water and illuminating scattered clouds in a dramatic blue-and-gold sky. Dense evergreen trees frame both sides of the composition, especially a dark forest wall on the right and steep rocky cliffs on the left. Add subtle details: mist rising from the lake, scattered foreground rocks and driftwood, warm reflections rippling on the water, and exactly 2 deer standing near the right shoreline. Use 19th-century Hudson River School romantic landscape, highly detailed brushwork, luminous atmosphere, epic scale, serene mood, rich warm color palette, naturalistic lighting, no text, no borders.
